check_dependencies.title: Check for missing dependencies
check_dependencies.description: Scanning the bottle for missing runtime libraries and components.

install_dependency.title: Install missing dependency
install_dependency.description: Install the missing runtime component via Winetricks. This may take a few minutes and cannot be undone automatically.

verify_dependency.title: Did the installation help?
verify_dependency.description: Try launching the program again to check whether the dependency installation resolved the issue.

dependencies_resolved.title: Dependency issue resolved
dependencies_resolved.description: The missing dependency has been installed and the issue appears to be resolved.

dependencies_ok.title: Dependencies checked
dependencies_ok.description: Dependency check complete. Continuing to the next diagnostic step.
